build.beforeDevCommand: bash -c 'dir=$(dirname $(dirname $0)); mkdir -p $dir/dist/vendor/xterm && cp $dir/index.html $dir/app.js $dir/style.css $dir/logo.png $dir/logo-app.svg $dir/dist/ && cp -r $dir/vendor/xterm/* $dir/dist/vendor/xterm/; while sleep 2; do cp $dir/index.html $dir/app.js $dir/style.css $dir/logo.png $dir/logo-app.svg $dir/dist/ 2>/dev/null; done' bash
build.beforeBuildCommand: bash -c 'dir=$(dirname $(dirname $0)); rm -rf $dir/src-tauri/server-dist; mkdir -p $dir/dist/vendor/xterm; cp $dir/index.html $dir/app.js $dir/style.css $dir/logo.png $dir/logo-app.svg $dir/dist/; cp -r $dir/vendor/xterm/* $dir/dist/vendor/xterm/; mkdir -p $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules; cp $dir/server.js $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/; cp -r $dir/node_modules/ws $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules/; mkdir -p $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules/node-pty/lib $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules/node-pty/build/Release; cp $dir/node_modules/node-pty/package.json $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules/node-pty/; cp -r $dir/node_modules/node-pty/lib/* $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules/node-pty/lib/; cp $dir/node_modules/node-pty/build/Release/pty.node $dir/src-tauri/server-dist/node_modules/node-pty/build/Release/' bash
